notes: Surface-anchored mining robots for low-gravity bodies: near-Earth asteroids, small moons, and other objects below 1.0 m/s².
miner_type: microgravity — deployment blocked at sites with gravity >= 1.0 m/s².
Uses anchoring tethers and thrust-counter reaction systems to stay surface-coupled without relying on weight.
mining_rate_kg_per_hr describes bulk fragment capture and volatiles suction throughput.
Multiple units on the same site may be operated concurrently; rates sum.
Draws electric_mw from ship or surface power bus during active operations.
